title: PRISM-VFL: A Differentially Private Vertical Federated Framework for Heterogeneous Multi-Task Clinical Prediction
description: PRISM-VFL is a differentially private vertical federated learning framework for heterogeneous multi-task clinical prediction. It enables privacy-preserving collaborative training across institutions that hold disjoint feature sets for the same patients, supporting simultaneous prediction of multiple clinical outcomes (e.g., in-hospital mortality and decompensation) under formal (ε, δ)-differential privacy guarantees. This repository contains the full framework implementation, all experiments, results, and manuscript figures.

creators.name: Korkmaz, H. Ibrahim
creators.affiliation: Amsterdam UMC / Red Cross Hospital, Beverwijk

notes: R.V.B. and A.A.S. contributed equally. H.I.K. and V.M.S. share last authorship.
